description: A survey dataset for a Colorado foothills project was collected by two different crews using different column formats. Import and merge 'western_tract.csv' (Format: Point, Northing/Y, Easting/X, Elevation/Z, Code) and 'eastern_tract.csv' (Format: Point, Easting/X, Northing/Y, Elevation/Z, Code) from C:\Users\Docker\Documents\SurveyData\ into a single TopoCal project. Generate a unified terrain triangulation (Malla de Triángulos) using all loaded points. Export the combined point list to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\combined_points.csv and save the merged TopoCal project to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\combined_site.top.
